mission.statement: Design, engineer, manufacture, and execute architectural ceiling systems that fully integrate aesthetic requirements, technical constraints, and buildability into a unified engineered solution.
core_actions: Technical coordination with EPC and architectural teams
mission.mission_focus: Transform architectural concepts into reliable, buildable ceiling systems without loss of design intent

vision.statement: To become the most trusted Architectural Engineering System brand in Iran and a recognized regional authority in architectural ceiling systems across the Middle East and CIS markets.
vision.long_term_goal: Establish AvizSazeh as a global benchmark for engineered architectural ceiling systems
vision_expansion: Regional leadership in GCC architectural EPC projects
Recognition as a system-based engineering brand
Expansion into advanced architectural envelope systems

strategic_alignment.vision_alignment: Regional and global architectural engineering authority
strategic_alignment.brand_direction: From product manufacturer → to system engineering partner

success_definition.short_term: Trusted supplier for architectural ceiling systems in EPC projects
success_definition.mid_term: Preferred engineering partner for architects and consultants
success_definition.long_term: Regional leader in architectural system engineering solutions
